forecast-period.text: Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely later this evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 25 to 30 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of morning frost near the Barossa Valley. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely later this evening. Winds north to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn then tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Mostly clear. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, most likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 25 to 30 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost in the north. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later tonight. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost south of Hawker. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the coast. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the east coast. Slight chance of a shower near the west coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly clear. Medium chance of rain in the far northeast, becoming less likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Mostly sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
